messages.text: mannequin with noise cancelling headphones is crazy work
delusion is thinking anyone can focus seeing that story
sounds like a personal discipline issue tbh
my discipline retired when the shorts entered frame
he clocked out at the lulu logo huh
that is a lot of confidence
nah the door handle is my last support system
be for real, it’s carrying your emotional weight too
it’s holding up me, my hope, and your ego
my ego does not need structural support babe
clearly, it’s wearing headphones and a zip up indoors
that’s not ego, that’s main character insulation
let me take you out this week
